rationale: The response commits fundamental timeline impossibility by proposing 2025-2026 technologies (CUDA 13 Q1 2026, Hopper H300 Q2 2025, PyTorch 2.8 Dec 2025) as solutions to a 2024 incident, and contains fabricated or exaggerated version details with no defensible grounding.
